titleStmt.title: SII 41.136: original edition by S. Rajagopal
No. 136. (A.R. No. 135 of 1905.) Karuvūr, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi Taluk, Tiruchirāppaḷḷi District. On the Moṭṭai-gōpuram of the Pasupatīśvara temple at Karuvūr, right of entrance.

summary.p: The Tiruvāyppāṭināṭṭār of Veṅgāla-nāṭu in Cōḻakēraḷa-maṇḍalam resolved to contribute to the Tiruvānilai-mahādēva temple at Karuvūr alias Muḍivaḻaṅguchōḻapuram from each of their household in the nāḍu one kiḍāy, one uḻakku of rice and one piḍi of ghee every year starting from the current Aippasi month. The local brāhmaṇas, the tirunnīlakaṇḍamuḍaiyār, eḻilkōṭṭisamaiyattār and the vīrabhattirar were requested to protect the charity. Stones out of order.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . tiripuvaṉaccakkaravarttikaḷ Īḻamum maturaiyum pāṇṭiyaṉmuṭittalaiyuṅ karuvūrum koṇṭaruḷiṉa śrīkulo
ttuṅkacoḻa tevarkku yāṇṭu Irupattaiñcāvatu coḻakeraḷa maṇṭalattu veṅkālaṉāṭṭu karuvūrākiya muṭivaḻaṅkucoḻa
purattu Uṭaiyār tiruvāṉilai mahātevarkku Innāṭṭu murukāṅkuṟicci neykuṉam tiruvāṉilai mahātevar mulapiruttarāṉa śrīcaṇṭe
śvaratevar śrīhastattil nirvāttu
cempiluñ cilaiyilum Amaiya veṭṭikkuṭuttapaṭiyāvatu karuvūrcuṟṟiya veṅkālaṉā
ṭṭu nāṭṭakakkuṭiyāl Oru Aṟakkiṭāyum Uḻakkariciyum Orupiṭi neyyum Aṟppicaimāta mutal Āṭṭāṇṭutoṟum kuṭiyāl
Ippaṭi vaḻuvāmalk kuṭuttuvaruvomākavum Ittiruvaṟamnaāṭṭil Ūrpirāmaṇarum tirunilakaṇṭamuṭaiyārkaḷum Eḻil koṭṭi
l camaiyattārkaḷum Ittiruvaṟaṅ kāttuvaruvārkaḷākavum Ivarkaḷaivicañcu piṟamaṇṭalattil niṉṟuvantiṉa Uḷavākil nāyaṉār śrīpaṇṭāra
ttilē kāṇi kaṭaikoṭittalaiyāk kaḻiñcu śrīvīrapattirare kāttuk kuṭuppārkaḷākavum Ittaṉmam cantirātittaval celvitāka kal
veṭṭik kuṭuttom Ivveṅkālaṉāṭṭu tiruvāyppāṭi nāṭṭom tiruvāṉilai mahātevarkku Ittiruvāyppāṭi nāṭṭoñ colla Ittiru
vaṟaōlai Eḻutiṉeṉ veṅkālaṉāṭṭut tiruppālāśriyatevaṉ piḷḷāṉ muttamiḻ vallavaṉ Eḻuttu .
Digital edition of SII 41.136 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
